name: Pommes Gratinee Forezienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and cut into 1/8-inch thick slices.
2. Coat the bottom and sides of a shallow oven-proof serving dish with melted butter.
3. Layer the potato slices in the baking dish.
4. Sprinkle the potato layers with salt, pepper, and minced garlic.
5. Pour heavy cream over the potato layers.
6. Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil pierced with 2 or 3 small holes to release steam.
7. Bake in a 400 degree oven until the potatoes are tender, about 60 minutes.
